title: cutandia rigescens
intro: Cutandia rigescens, also known as Cutandia, is a type of flowering plant in the grass family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and respiratory problems due to its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Cutandia rigescens include relief from coughs, colds, and bronchitis, as well as soothing digestive issues such as diarrhea and nausea. Cutandia rigescens can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and teas, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
